subcodes.first_line: O 'Azizu'llah! We have made mention of thee, and at this moment thou beholdest My remembrance even as the sun rising resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عزیزالله انا ذکرناک و فی هذا الحین ان ذکری تراه مره کالشمس المشرقه من
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of the Manifestation of God
